title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, an AI pioneer and Nobel laureate, argues that current AI systems already demonstrate understanding and possibly consciousness, and warns that superintelligence may arrive sooner than widely expected. He expresses concerns about inadequate safety measures, job displacement, limits of corporate self-regulation, and the need for regulatory intervention to steer AI development.
